description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Book a standard home inspection for a 3-bedroom single-family home in ZIP 94110 on the first Friday of next month at 10:00 AM, add an add-on that inspects for termites or other wood-destroying pests, and choose the cheapest available inspector with at least 4.5 stars whose total price including that add-on is no more than $500.

target_names: Standard SFH slot in 94110 on first Friday of next month at 10:00 AM
Ben Martinez at that 10:00 AM slot

criteria.date_constraint: first Friday of next calendar month relative to 2026-03-03
criteria.selection_rule_for_inspector: cheapest option that meets rating and price constraints

tasks.instruction: Use the instant quote tool to get pricing for a 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo of about 900 sq ft in ZIP 30309 built around 2010 with no extra services, then select a mid-tier package that includes same-day PDF reporting and is priced between $250 and $350.

tasks.instruction: From the inspection packages, select the cheapest option that includes both radon and mold testing with a base price of at most $600, then schedule the earliest available morning appointment within the next 14 days.

target_names: Earliest morning appointment for that package within 14 days

criteria.appointment_selection_rule: earliest available date and time in morning window

tasks.instruction: Set up an inspection for a 4-unit apartment-style property of about 6,500 sq ft in ZIP 10001, include a same-day digital report option, and choose the earliest available evening time (5 PM or later) whose travel fee is $75 or less.

criteria.appointment_selection_rule: earliest date and time that satisfies time window and travel fee cap

tasks.instruction: Choose an inspection bundle that combines a full standard home inspection with a radon test and has a regular price between $450 and $550, book it for the next available Saturday between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM in the scheduler, apply the SAVE50 promo code, and proceed with the discounted total under $500.

target_names: Next available Saturday mid-day bundle slot (2026-03-07 11:00 in 94110)

criteria.appointment_selection_rule: next available Saturday in that time window

tasks.instruction: On the blog, find the most recent article from the past year whose title refers to a first-time homebuyer inspection checklist, add it to your favorites, and use the share menu to copy its link.

target_names: First-Time Homebuyer Inspection Checklist: 25 Things to Look For

tasks.instruction: Use the service-area checker to look up an address that is outside the coverage area, choose the first suggested nearby covered city from the results, open that city’s service page, and submit a contact request indicating interest in an inspection near the original address.

expected_values.message_text: Interested in an inspection near 999 Remote Lane; using the nearest covered city you suggested.

criteria.nearby_city_selection_rule: choose the first suggested nearby covered city

tasks.instruction: Configure a standard home inspection for a 3-bedroom home in ZIP 80205 on the 15th of next month at a mid-day time, add exactly three different add-on services that test for radon gas, termite activity, and the main sewer line so their combined add-on subtotal stays under $200, and then submit the booking request with your contact details.

target_names: Mid-day standard inspection slot in 80205 on next month’s 15th at 1:00 PM

criteria.final_action: submit booking request with contact info
